name: Session Search Context Loader
description: A deterministic Buddy session search tool that turns FTS/trigram/LIKE history hits into an auditable context_package with message refs, snippets, session lineage, budget metadata, and warnings.

inputSchema.name: Query
inputSchema.description: Search query used to find Buddy history messages.

inputSchema.name: Current Session ID
inputSchema.description: Optional current Buddy session id; matching lineage is excluded from discover results.

inputSchema.name: Bookend
inputSchema.description: Number of session bookend messages to include when available.

inputSchema.name: Role Filter
inputSchema.description: Optional roles to search, usually user and assistant.

inputSchema.name: Max Chars
inputSchema.description: Maximum rendered session search context characters.

outputSchema.name: Session Search Report
outputSchema.description: Search query, hit message ids, session lineage, source refs, budget, and warnings.
